case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR MAY-30-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-30-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT , ORDER JUDGMENT OF APR-24-2008 SET ASIDE
